changes: threed/racketsport/ball_joint_anchor_search.py:1 added immutable observation/camera/plane types, typed refusals, deterministic seed enumeration, free-variable TRF+Huber bounce-state optimization, ray/court/net constraints, ranked candidate-only solver-contract output, and full per-candidate provenance.
tests/racketsport/test_tt3d_joint_anchor_search.py:1 added seven named synthetic/geometry/refusal/contract/provenance/determinism fixtures; exact names and measured fixture results are in HANDOFF.md.
runs/lanes/tt3d_anchor_core_20260710/HANDOFF.md:1 recorded the API sketch, candidate contract, search model, test names, fixture measurements, and integration limits.
runs/lanes/tt3d_anchor_core_20260710/report.json:1 recorded and schema-validated the lane report.
honest_issues: The core is intentionally unwired and was not scored on Wolverine. It cannot claim the pre-registered fallback <5/11 kill bar, recovered coverage, or any product improvement.
The proposal model is gravity-only piecewise ballistic; the existing production solver remains authoritative for drag/spin/BVP fitting and every fail-closed gate.

Flanking contact anchors are explicitly search-window boundary hypotheses, not detected contacts or measurements. Integration must decide whether to consume only the bounce with real contacts or test the full hypothesis set.
Net clearance cost is evaluated only when a proposed trajectory crosses the supplied net plane inside the observation window; no crossing is recorded as unevaluated, not as proof of clearance.
Synthetic recovery is implementation evidence only, not real-world accuracy proof or promotion. VERIFIED=0 remains binding and protected labels were not read.

Repo structure checks: scaffold index completed with zero missing direct-reference/related tests; dead-code audit passed with 562 Python sources and zero unknown sources; storage audit failed because allowlisted large source fixtures are absent, while unknown large tracked and untracked files were both zero.
The shared worktree contains unrelated concurrent edits, including forbidden files owned by other lanes. This lane left them untouched and made no branch, commit, git add, or protected-label read.
BEST-STACK DELTA: (c) none; research module only, unwired.
next: After concurrent BALL owners release the integration files, a separately fenced integration lane should adapt selected candidate anchors into the existing solver, keep the arm default-off, persist chosen/rejected hypotheses, pass every sample through unchanged fail-closed gates, and score the frozen Wolverine fallback <5/11 kill criterion before any promotion.
